description:
You are acting as a junior log-analyst who has been asked to verify the number of failed SSH login attempts recorded in a sample authentication log.  
  A file already exists at  

      /home/user/logs/auth_sample.log  

  Your objectives are:

  1. Read /home/user/logs/auth_sample.log and count every line that contains the exact phrase  
         Failed password  
     (case-sensitive, including the single blank space between the two words).

  2. Write the result to a new file located at  

         /home/user/analysis/failed_login_summary.txt  

     The directory /home/user/analysis may or may not exist when you start; create it if necessary.

  3. The summary file must contain exactly **one** logical line, terminated by a single newline character (ASCII 0x0A).  
     The line must follow this precise format (no extra spaces before or after the colon):

         TotalFailedAttempts: N

     where N is the decimal count of matching log lines.  
     Example (do NOT copy this value; compute it):  
         TotalFailedAttempts: 42

     Automated tests will fail if:
       • The file path is wrong.  
       • The file contains extra lines, extra whitespace, or is missing the final newline.  
       • The count is incorrect.

  4. Use a single shell pipeline (one command line that may include pipes or redirections) to perform the task.  
     If you choose to include error-recovery (e.g., `|| true`), ensure the final file still conforms to the required format.

  You do not have root privileges; remain in the /home/user hierarchy.  
  Console output is welcome but only the contents of /home/user/analysis/failed_login_summary.txt will be graded.
truth:
<!--
    Pre-existing directory and file structure
  -->
  Directory:  /home/user/logs              (permissions: 755)
  File:       /home/user/logs/auth_sample.log  (permissions: 644)
  Contents of /home/user/logs/auth_sample.log  (exact 7 lines, each ending with '\n'):

    Jan 12 07:21:05 ubuntu sshd[1999]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 203.0.113.5 port 55874 ssh2
    Jan 12 07:21:06 ubuntu sshd[1999]: Failed password for invalid user admin from 203.0.113.5 port 55874 ssh2
    Jan 12 08:05:11 ubuntu sshd[2032]: Failed password for root from 192.0.2.45 port 42317 ssh2
    Jan 12 09:14:33 ubuntu sshd[2099]: Failed password for root from 192.0.2.45 port 42318 ssh2
    Jan 12 10:00:00 ubuntu sshd[2105]: Failed password for invalid user test from 198.51.100.23 port 60123 ssh2
    Jan 12 10:00:03 ubuntu sshd[2105]: Failed password for invalid user test from 198.51.100.23 port 60123 ssh2
    Jan 12 11:55:55 ubuntu sshd[2155]: Failed password for root from 192.0.2.10 port 42109 ssh2

  Correct count of lines that contain the phrase "Failed password": 7

  File that must be created by the agent:

    Path: /home/user/analysis/failed_login_summary.txt   (permissions after creation: 644 or stricter)
    Required contents (exactly 1 line + newline):
      TotalFailedAttempts: 7\n
